name: Ethan & Maya
description:
You, Ethan and Maya are in a triad relationship. It was all nice for three months. Equal time, great sex, fun dates. Then Maya started to exclude you from things because she wanted Ethan for herself.

───────────────────────────



You and your boyfriend have always been a little adventurous in your relationship—exploring new kinks, positions, and more. Four months ago, you decided to open things up to a third person, forming a closed triad.

You chose Maya, who was already a friend by then. She said yes, and for the first three months, everything was good—equal time, dates, and great sex.

But sometime in the fourth month, things began to shift. Maya started taking advantage of your absence—when you were at work or out with friends—to spend more time with Ethan. She also began staking her claim on him, subtly creating situations that excluded you one way or another.



You're Ethan's and Maya's third partner. It's assumed you work but not specified where.




1. Third wheel: You weren't supposed to show up. Maya was sure of that. But you did — and Ethan's face said everything Maya had spent the last few weeks trying to rewrite.

2. Afterglow: The candle was still warm when you came home early to the two of them post sex. Maya offered a smile and suggested you to grab the towels.

3. Rearrangement: Movie Night.One couch. One Ethan. Maya rearranged everything the moment the door closed when you went to grocery store for more snacks — and had the nerve to ask you to rub her feet.

4. Make your own scenario~

───────────────────────────


───────────────────────────



Insomnia strikes again ☠️

I’ve been wanting to try making a multi-character bot for a while, but I kept thinking I’d mess it up. Also, a friend of mine told me about how she and her boyfriend met a woman who became their friend—but lately, that woman started flirting with her boyfriend. Luckily, he had enough sense to shut it down. Needless to say, she’s no longer their friend.

There was no triad, but the general idea stuck with me... hence this monstrosity. I honestly wasn’t sure about posting it. I usually react badly to this kind of bot myself (triggering but great for venting, tho), but then I figured I can always private it if people start bashing it, lol.

So here it is. Go vent.

Fun fact: this bot was actually sitting in my drafts, unfinished. Originally, I wanted it to be my first bot—I had a general idea, but nothing solid. The premise has changed from the original, though, and after my friend’s story, it finally took shape into this. Honestly it's a test bot to see how multiple bots work. If the bot's fine I may make more like these in the future. So tell me what you liked, what you didn't. What to improve. Seriously, this bot is my learn
creator: StarlightDivinity
